name: the live wrapper declines an unresolved technology (cite-or-decline)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-live.sh" --technology Cobol --project L561A03 --cache fc 2>e.err; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'status=unresolved' e.err && echo live-declines-unknown 1>&2
setup: mkdir -p fc && printf '%s\n' 'Type Vue props explicitly.' 'Prefer plain TypeScript functions for Vue composables.' 'A line with no framework mention.' > fc/typescript-handbook.txt
